name: World Legacy Survivor
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>遺</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>物</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>醒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>存</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぞん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Excavate the top 5 cards of your Deck, and if you do, add 1 excavated "Krawler" monster or "World Legacy" card to your hand, also send the remaining cards to the GY. Otherwise, shuffle all excavated cards into the Deck. For the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck, except Link Monsters. You can only activate 1 "World Legacy Survivor" per turn.
eff: Excavate the top 5 cards of your Deck, and if you do, add 1 excavated "Krawler" monster or "World Legacy" card to your hand, also send the remaining cards to the GY. Otherwise, shuffle all excavated cards into the Deck. For the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck, except Link Monsters. You can only activate 1 "World Legacy Survivor" per turn.

action: Adds excavated cards to the hand
Sends excavated cards to the Graveyard
Sends from the top of your Deck to your Graveyard
Shuffles excavated cards into the Deck
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
